name: io.github.dl-eigenart/agentshield-mcp
title: AgentShield
description: Runtime gateway and real-time classifier for LLM agents. Detects prompt-injection, jailbreak, and social-engineering attempts in any untrusted text before your agent processes it. Single tool: classify_text. Hosted API (p50 2.4 ms, F1 0.921 on a public 5,972-sample benchmark).

environmentVariables.name: AGENTSHIELD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AgentShield API key. Free tier: 100 classifications/day, no credit card. Sign up at https://agentshield.pro/signup.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTSHIELD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override base URL for self-hosted AgentShield gateway. Defaults to https://api.agentshield.pro.
